Structure# CVTimeStampFlags

iOS 4.0+iPadOS 4.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.4+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
struct CVTimeStampFlags
```

## [Topics](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags#topics)

### [Constants](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags#Constants)

[`static var bottomField: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/bottomfield)The timestamp represents the bottom lines of an interlaced image.[`static var hostTimeValid: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/hosttimevalid)The value in the host time field is valid.[`static var isInterlaced: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/isinterlaced)A convenience constant indicating that the timestamp is for an interlaced image.[`static var rateScalarValid: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/ratescalarvalid)The value in the rate scalar field is valid.[`static var smpteTimeValid: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/smptetimevalid)The value in the SMPTE time field is valid.[`static var topField: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/topfield)The timestamp represents the top lines of an interlaced image.[`static var videoHostTimeValid: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/videohosttimevalid)A convenience constant indicating that both the video time and host time fields are valid.[`static var videoRefreshPeriodValid: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/videorefreshperiodvalid)The value in the video refresh period field is valid.[`static var videoTimeValid: CVTimeStampFlags`](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags/videotimevalid)The value in the video time field is valid.### [Initializers](/documentation/corevideo/cvtimestampflags#Initializers)
